title: paris polyphylla var. thibetica
intro: Paris polyphylla var. thibetica, also known as Himalayan maidenhair fern, is a plant species that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Paris polyphylla var. thibetica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
